value="<h1 style="margin-top: 0px;"><font style="font-size: 18px;">Additional Information</font></h1><ul><li>This diagram shows both the repository structure and suggested workflow for the development &amp; final distribution of your lesson(s) as an ACT-CMS Faculty Fellow.</li></ul><ul><li>Suggested workflow based on the "GitHub Flow" collaborative development model. See links below for more information:</li><ul><li>&nbsp;<a href="https://nvie.com/posts/a-successful-git-branching-model/">https://nvie.com/posts/a-successful-git-branching-model/</a></li><li><a href="https://docs.github.com/en/get-started/using-github/github-flow">https://docs.github.com/en/get-started/using-github/github-flow</a></li></ul></ul>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="170" width="482.5" x="68" y="600" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="slvV4HiWkGqebP5L4PAK-87" parent="1" style="shape=hexagon;perimeter=hexagonPerimeter2;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fixedSize=1;" value="Pull Request &amp; Merge<div><font face="Courier New">act-cms/instructor-materials</font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="250" x="840" y="461" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="slvV4HiWkGqebP5L4PAK-91" parent="1" style="verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;html=1;strokeWidth=4;shape=mxgraph.flowchart.on-page_reference;plain-purple;strokeColor=light-dark(#B20000,#000000);fillColor=light-dark(#e51400, #ff0e00);fontColor=#ffffff;gradientColor=none;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="30" x="903.25" y="356" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="slvV4HiWkGqebP5L4PAK-92" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="<div>Delete <font face="Courier New">dev</font> branch after final merge to&nbsp;</div><div><font face="Courier New">act-cms/instructor-materials</font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="210" x="860" y="395" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
